title: Ride-Vide
description: Ride-sharing platform connecting UChicago students to split airport transportation costs
details:
// Ride-Vide Platform

# Ride-Vide: Smart Ride Sharing for Students

A web platform designed to help University of Chicago students connect and share rides to/from the airport, reducing costs and environmental impact.

## The Challenge
UChicago students traveling to/from O'Hare and Midway airports faced:
- High Uber/Lyft costs ($40-60 per trip)
- No easy way to find travel mates
- Difficulty coordinating shared rides
- Missed opportunities to reduce carbon footprint

## Solution Features
- Facebook Login integration for authentication
- Real-time matching of students with similar travel times
- Group chat functionality to coordinate pickups
- Cost splitting calculator
- Travel schedule coordination
- Safety features (verified UChicago students only)

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: React.js
- Backend: Node.js + Express
- Authentication: Facebook OAuth
- Real-time chat: Socket.io
- Database: MongoDB
- Hosted on Heroku

## Key Features
1. **Smart Matching**: Algorithm matches students based on:
   - Flight times (±2 hours)
   - Airport destination
   - Preferred pickup locations

2. **Group Coordination**: 
   - Automated group chat creation
   - Shared itinerary
   - Cost breakdown per person

3. **Safety First**:
   - UChicago email verification
   - Facebook profile verification
   - User ratings and reviews

## Impact
- Connected 200+ students
- Saved students $10,000+ in transportation costs
- Reduced carbon emissions through shared rides
- Active usage during holiday breaks

## Learning Outcomes
- OAuth implementation and security
- Real-time communication systems
- User experience design for niche communities
- Scaling and maintaining a production application
